chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 904 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 14.06.2023 Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General for the State Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with SIP Manshad Ali Kalwar, SHO and ASI Ali Murad Mirani, Investigating Officer Crime No.40/2023 of Police Station, Soorah >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Mr. Humail Rafi Mahessar, Advocate, files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.5, whereas, statements are also filed by Respondents No.2 to 4, which are taken on record. Petitioner No.1, namely, Mst. Afshan alias Absha is present. The Investigating Officer of Crime No.40 of 2023 of Police Station, Soorah, District Khairpur shall record the statement of Petitioner No.1, namely, Mst. Afshan alias Absha as well as the complainant. He shall submit the statement of petitioner No.1, namely, Mst. Afshan alias Absha along with his supplementary challan and evidence which the complainant has given to him, if any, before learned Magistrate seized of the matter. The learned Magistrate shall apply his independent mind to take a decision based on law thereafter. As far as no arrest order which was given on 25.05.2023 is concerned, the same will remain into effect for a period of two weeks during which time the petitioners should approach the relevant Court to seek their relief. The petition stands disposed of along with listed application in the above terms. Judge Judge ARBROHI
